CustomField.formula: leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__r.leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__r.Name &" - "& leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__r.leaseworks__Serial_Number__c &"("& TEXT(leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__r.leaseworks__Type__c) &") - " & Name & " (" & leaseworks__Part_Number__c & ") - Thrust: " & leaseworks__Current_Thrust_Setting__c & " - Life Limit: " & TEXT(leaseworks__Life_Limit__c) & " - Price: " & TEXT( leaseworks__Replacement_Cost__c )
CustomField.label: _LLP_sum_info
